attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
TMP.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,         
TMP.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,          
TMP.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,           
TMP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,     
TMP.START_TV_DATETIME,             
TMP.START_SSP_DATE,               
TMP.END_TV_DATETIME,               
TMP.END_SSP_DATE,                  
TMP.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,   
TMP.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE,          
TMP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,           
TMP.SS_CODE,                       
TMP.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,            
TMP.EDW_CREATE_USER,               
TMP.EDW_UPDATE_USER,               
TMP.EDW_CREATE_DTM,           
TMP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,    
TMP.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
FROM
(
SELECT
A.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,         
A.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,          
A.SALES_REP_NUMBER BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,           
A.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,     
A.START_TV_DTM  START_TV_DATETIME,             
CAST(A.START_TV_DTM AS DATE)  START_SSP_DATE,                
A.END_TV_DTM  END_TV_DATETIME,               
CAST(A.END_TV_DTM  AS DATE)  END_SSP_DATE,
A.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,   
A.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE,          
A.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,           
A.SS_CD SS_CODE,                       
A.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,            
A.EDW_CREATE_USER EDW_CREATE_USER,              
A.EDW_UPDATE_USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,              
A.EDW_CREATE_DTM EDW_CREATE_DTM,           
A.EDW_UPDATE_DTM EDW_UPDATE_DTM,           
A.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT   
FROM
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV A
INNER JOIN
$$STGDB.WI_N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV_DAC B
ON
A.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = B.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND
A.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY <> -7777 
WHERE
A.SS_CD = 'CG'
AND
A.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
AND
A.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID =  'wf_WI_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGN_TV_DAC')
UNION ALL
SELECT
EX.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,         
EX.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,          
EX.SALES_REP_NUMBER BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,           
EX.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,     
EX.START_TV_DTM  START_TV_DATETIME,             
CAST(EX.START_TV_DTM AS DATE)  START_SSP_DATE,                
EX.END_TV_DTM  END_TV_DATETIME,               
CAST(EX.END_TV_DTM  AS DATE)  END_SSP_DATE,
EX.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,   
EX.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE,          
EX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,           
EX.SS_CD SS_CODE,                       
EX.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,            
EX.EDW_CREATE_USER EDW_CREATE_USER,              
EX.EDW_UPDATE_USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,              
EX.EDW_CREATE_DTM EDW_CREATE_DTM,           
EX.EDW_UPDATE_DTM EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EX.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGN_CG1 EX
INNER JOIN
$$STGDB.WI_N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV_DAC B
ON
EX.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = B.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
)TMP
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TMP. SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY ORDER BY TMP.START_TV_DATETIME DESC) = 1

SELECT
A.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY,   
A.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT,         
A.SCA_TRANSACTION_TYPE,          
A.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,         
A.DV_SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,      
A.SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM,         
A.DV_SCA_SOURCE_UPDATE_DT,       
A.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,            
A.SS_CD,                         
A.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,            
A.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,      
A.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,     
A.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT,
A.SALES_REP_NUMBER,              
A.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT,         
A.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,           
A.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT,        
A.EDW_CREATE_DTM,                
A.EDW_CREATE_USER,               
A.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                
A.EDW_UPDATE_USER,               
A.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY,    
A.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,       
A.START_TV_DTM,                  
A.END_TV_DTM,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
A.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT 
FROM                
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV A
WHERE 1=2
/*
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV_DAC B WHERE A.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = B.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
AND
A.SS_CD = 'CG'
AND
A.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
AND
A.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY <> -7777
AND
A.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID =  'wf_WI_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGN_TV_CG1') */
